Hello

Since yesterday, I’ve been experiencing a bug.
When I launch the game, I see the "Qooka Games" logo, and then the screen goes black and nothing happens. I’ve already tried uninstalling and reinstalling the game, but that didn’t work. 
I also tried launching the game through both Steam and the official website, but that didn’t help either. 

Thank you in advance for your help
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Game not starting, Black screen after the launching

content:
Hey again! I managed to fix the problem!

If anyone’s facing the same issue, this might help.
My problem was a corrupted runtime library—the Visual C++ Redistributable.

All I did was download and repair these two packages: Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 Redistributable (x64) and Microsoft Visual C++ 2015-2022 Redistributable (x86).

Thanks and have fun !
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Game not starting, Black screen after the launching
